help.description: Find contact information and useful resources.

help.developer_support_desc: For technical issues, bugs or suggestions contact:
help.faq_description: Find quick answers to the most common questions about GlobalTradeLab

q1.question: How do I register on GlobalTradeLab?
q1.answer: To register, click 'Sign Up' on the homepage, complete the form with your name, email and password, select your role (Student or Teacher), and click 'Sign Up'. You'll receive immediate access to the platform.

q2.question: How do I join a classroom?
q2.answer: As a student, after logging in, go to the 'Rooms' section, click 'New Room Code', enter the 6-character code provided by your teacher and click 'Join'. You'll be automatically added to the room.

q3.question: How do I make my first trade?
q3.answer: Go to the Dashboard, select an asset from the market, choose whether you want to Buy or Sell, enter the quantity or amount you want to invest, write a justification for your trade (mandatory), and click 'Trade'. Your trade will execute immediately.

q1.question: How do I open a position?
q1.answer: To open a position, select the asset on the Dashboard, choose 'Buy' or 'Sell', decide whether to invest by number of shares or total amount, enter the desired value, write your justification and confirm the trade. You can see your open positions in the 'Positions' section.

q2.question: How do I close a position?
q2.answer: Go to the 'Positions' section on the Dashboard, find the position you want to close and click the 'Close position' button. The trade will close at the current market price and you'll see your profit or loss reflected immediately.

q3.question: What are automation orders (Take Profit, Stop Loss)?
q3.answer: Take Profit automatically closes your position when it reaches a target price to secure profits. Stop Loss closes your position when the price falls to a specific level to limit losses. These tools help you manage risk without constant monitoring.

q1.question: How do I set up price alarms?
q1.answer: In the 'Settings' section or from the price chart, you can configure alarms that will notify you when an asset reaches a specific price. This helps you stay aware of trading opportunities without constantly watching the market.

q2.question: What is experimental mode?
q2.answer: Experimental mode is a feature for teachers that allows simulating historical market events (like financial crises or bubbles) so students can experience different scenarios and learn to handle extreme market situations.

q3.question: How do notifications work?
q3.answer: Notifications alert you about important events: order execution, price alarms reached, teacher messages, and platform updates. You can configure your notification preferences in the Settings section.

q1.question: How do I change the platform language?
q1.answer: Go to 'Settings', find the 'Language' section and select your preferred language from the available list (English, Español, Português, Русский, हिन्दी, Deutsch, Français, Italiano). The interface will change immediately.

q2.question: How do I switch between light and dark theme?
q2.answer: In the 'Settings' section, you'll find the 'Theme' option where you can toggle between light mode and dark mode according to your preference. The change applies instantly across the entire platform.

q3.question: Where can I view my trading history?
q3.answer: You can view your complete transaction history in the 'History' section of the Dashboard. Here you'll see all your past trades with details like date, symbol, type, quantity, price and justification.

q1.question: How do I create a classroom?
q1.answer: As a teacher, go to the 'Rooms' section, click 'Create New Room', enter a descriptive name for your class and confirm. You'll receive a unique 6-character code that your students will use to join.

q2.question: How many students can I have per room?
q2.answer: The student limit depends on your plan: Starter Plan (10 students), Professional Plan (15 students), Enterprise Plan (20 students). You can also create multiple rooms according to your plan.

q3.question: How do I monitor my students' performance?
q3.answer: In your Teacher Dashboard, you can view each student's portfolio, their open positions, transaction history, profit/loss and trade justifications. This allows you to provide personalized feedback and assess their learning.

q1.question: I don't see market prices, what should I do?
q1.answer: First, check your internet connection. If the problem persists, try refreshing the page (F5). If it continues, it may be a temporary data server issue. Contact technical support if the problem persists for more than 10 minutes.

q2.question: I can't join a room, why?
q2.answer: Verify that: 1) You're registered as a Student (not Teacher), 2) The room code is correct (6 characters), 3) You're not already in that room, 4) The room exists and is active. If everything is correct and the error persists, contact your teacher or technical support.

q3.question: What if I lost all my data?
q3.answer: GlobalTradeLab stores data locally in your browser. If you cleared your cache or switched browsers, your local data will be lost. To avoid this, always use the same browser and device. Contact technical support if you need to recover backup data.

hero.title: Privacy Policy
hero.subtitle: Your privacy is important to us. Learn how we protect your data.

introduction.title: Introduction
introduction.content: At GlobalTradeLab, we are committed to protecting your privacy and the security of your personal data. This privacy policy explains what information we collect, how we use it, and your rights regarding your personal data.

account.title: Account Data
account.content: We collect basic information when you register, including your name, email address, and account type (student or teacher). This information is stored locally in your browser.

usage.title: Platform Usage Data
usage.content: We record your simulated trading activities, including open positions, transaction history, portfolio balance, and platform settings. All this information is educational and stored locally.

technical.title: Technical Data
technical.content: We use browser localStorage to store preferences such as language, theme (dark/light), and chart settings. We do not collect additional personally identifiable information.

education.title: Educational Purposes
education.content: Your information is used exclusively for educational purposes: enabling trading simulation, tracking your progress, and facilitating interaction between teachers and students in the learning environment.

improvement.title: Service Improvement
improvement.content: We analyze aggregated and anonymous usage patterns to improve user experience, optimize functionalities, and develop new educational features.

communication.title: Communication
communication.content: We may use your email address to send important platform notifications, security updates, or information relevant to your educational experience.

sharing.title: Sharing Information
sharing.content: GlobalTradeLab is an educational platform that does NOT share, sell, or rent your personal information to third parties. Your data remains private and is only accessible to you and, in the case of students, to your teachers within the virtual classroom context. Teachers can view their students' trading performance and activity solely for educational purposes.

security.title: Data Security
security.content: We implement technical and organizational security measures to protect your data. Since all information is stored locally in your browser using localStorage, you have full control over your data. We recommend using strong passwords and keeping your browser updated. We do not store sensitive information on external servers.

localStorage.title: LocalStorage
localStorage.content: We use browser localStorage to store your session, user preferences, portfolio data, and settings. This information remains on your device and can be deleted at any time from your browser settings.

sessionStorage.title: SessionStorage
sessionStorage.content: We use sessionStorage to maintain temporary information during your active session. This information is automatically deleted when you close the browser.

essential.title: Essential Cookies
essential.content: We only use essential technical cookies necessary for the basic functioning of the platform (authentication, language preferences). We do not use advertising or third-party tracking cookies.

rights.title: User Rights
rights.content: You have the right to: (1) Access your personal data stored on the platform, (2) Rectify incorrect or incomplete information, (3) Delete your account and all associated data at any time, (4) Export your trading data for personal analysis, (5) Object to the processing of your data for certain purposes, (6) Withdraw your consent at any time. To exercise these rights, you can manage your information from the Settings section or contact us directly.

changes.title: Changes to this Policy
changes.content: We may update this privacy policy periodically to reflect changes in our practices or for legal reasons. We will notify you of significant changes through the platform or by email. The date of the last update is indicated at the end of this document.

contact.title: Contact
contact.content: If you have questions about this privacy policy, the handling of your personal data, or wish to exercise your rights, you can contact us through: Email: support@globaltradelab.com. We are committed to responding to your inquiries within 48 business hours.

cta.title: Have questions?
cta.subtitle: We're here to help you with any questions about your privacy and security.
